channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists just discovered a lost branch of Australiaâs marsupials
item.description: Fossils from Queensland suggest a newly recognized marsupial order may have survived in Australia for around 35 million years, rewriting part of the s...

item.title: A tiny universe in a bottle reveals clues to the origins of life
item.description: Researchers have created cosmic dust from scratch by recreating space-like conditions inside glass tubes. The dust contains complex carbon-rich molecu...

item.title: Researchers may have finally found the source of the global hum
item.description: The Hum, a mysterious low-frequency sound reported worldwide for decades, often has no identifiable source. Scientists are now testing a possible explanation.

item.title: Rare meteorite type identified as the dinosaur-killing asteroid
item.description: The asteroid that ended the dinosaurs 66 million years ago was a rare CO chondrite from a distant part of the solar system, according to scientists.
